description: AppChart is the Schema for the appcharts API

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to. Cannot be updated. In CamelCase. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: AppChartSpec defines the desired state of AppChart

description.description: Description of the chart. Long form to be used in detailed displays

helmChart.description: HelmChart is the name of the Helm chart used to deploy an application.

helmRepo.description: HelmRepo is the URL to the Helm repository where to fetch the helm chart. This can be empty. In that case the HelmChart field has to reference the chart as full URL instead of as a simple name.

settings.description: Settings declares the fields underneath `userValues` the user is allowed to customize when deploying an application with the helm chart referenced by this app chart.

additionalProperties.description: AppChartSetting is an older name for ChartSetting. Created to keep backward compatibility. Should also reduce misunderstandings of what kind of settings are handled in a particular context.

enum.description: Enumeration of allowed values, for types string, number, integer

maximum.description: Maximal allowed value, for number, integer

minimum.description: Minimal allowed value, for number, integer

type.description: Type of the setting (string, bool, number, or integer)

shortDescription.description: ShortDescription of the chart. To be used in list displays

values.description: Values provides settings, i.e. field names and values to customize the referenced helm chart when deploying an application with this app chart. Note that user-configurable settings are declared with `Settings` instead. While nothing checks against exposing a field set here to the user this is strongly discouraged, to avoid confusion.

status.description: AppChartStatus defines the observed state of AppChart
